**System learnings** — API quirks, Pulse patterns, SQLite gotchas, error handling, timeouts

**Personal learnings** — ADHD research (task initiation, body doubling, time blindness, gamification patterns), hiring frameworks (evidence sufficiency, differentiators vs table stakes), context engineering paradigm

**Process now:**
1. Open each file
2. Mark `[x]` for learnings to promote
3. Run the processor command shown at the top of each file

The underlying scripts are updated to handle both categories going forward. When you run triage again, it'll automatically split into two files.
